languages.text: {n}Генетор некоторое время медлит с ответом.{/n} "Обозначенный акт саботажа классифицирован как оказывающий экстремально тлетворное влияние на дисциплину в секторе. Приоритет: критический".

traits.locale_text: {n}Генетор некоторое время медлит с ответом.{/n} "Обозначенный акт саботажа классифицирован этой единицей, как оказывающий экстремально тлетворное влияние на дисциплину в секторе. Приоритет: критический".

languages.text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."
languages.original_text: {n}Генетор некоторое время медлит с ответом.{/n} "Обозначенный акт саботажа классифицирован как оказывающий экстремально тлетворное влияние на дисциплину в секторе. Приоритет: критический".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified by this unit as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."
{n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified by this unit as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."
{n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified by this unit as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

languages.text: {n}ジェネレーターの反応には時間がかかる.{/n} 「この部隊は、この破壊行為がセクターの規律に極めて有害な影響を与えることを認識している。優先順位:緊急」
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified by this unit as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

languages.text: {n}Genetör'ün cevap vermesi biraz zaman alıyor.{/n} "Bahsi geçen sabotaj eylemi, sektördeki disiplin üzerinde son derece zararlı bir etkiye sahip olarak sınıflandırıldı. Öncelik: Kritik."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

traits.locale_text: {n}Genetör'ün cevap vermesi biraz zaman alıyor.{/n} "Bahsi geçen sabotaj eylemi, sektördeki disiplin üzerinde son derece zararlı bir etkiye sahip olarak sınıflandırıldı. Öncelik: Kritik."

languages.text: {n}基因士停顿片刻才作出回应。{/n}“判定该妨碍行为对仿生区纪律具有极其恶劣的影响。优先级：危急。”
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

traits.locale_text: {n}基因士停顿片刻才作出回应。{/n}“判定该妨碍行为对仿生区纪律具有极其恶劣的影响。优先级：危急。”

languages.text: {n}Der Genetor lässt sich mit seiner Antwort Zeit.{/n} "Besagte Sabotage wird als geheim klassifiziert, da sie eine extrem nachteilige Wirkung auf die Disziplin des Sektors hat. Priorität: kritisch."
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Genetor lässt sich mit seiner Antwort Zeit.{/n} "Besagte Sabotage wird als geheim klassifiziert, da sie eine extrem nachteilige Wirkung auf die Disziplin des Sektors hat. Priorität: kritisch."

languages.text: {n}Le genetor prend le temps de réfléchir avant de répondre.{/n} « L'acte de sabotage en question est considéré par cette entité comme ayant un effet particulièrement délétère sur la discipline au sein du secteur concerné. Niveau de priorité : critique. »
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le genetor prend le temps de réfléchir avant de répondre.{/n} « L'acte de sabotage en question est considéré par cette entité comme ayant un effet particulièrement délétère sur la discipline au sein du secteur concerné. Niveau de priorité : critique. »

languages.text: {n}El genetor tarda un tiempo en responder.{/n} «Según mis datos, el acto de sabotaje detectado podría tener un efecto extremadamente perjudicial para la disciplina en el sector. Prioridad: crítica».
languages.original_text: {n}The Genetor takes some time to respond.{/n} "The noted act of sabotage is classified as having an extremely pernicious effect on discipline in the sector. Priority: critical."

traits.locale_text: {n}El genetor tarda un tiempo en responder.{/n} «Según mis datos, el acto de sabotaje detectado podría tener un efecto extremadamente perjudicial para la disciplina en el sector. Prioridad: crítica».
